text_blocks.text: The Marvel Universe is filled with infinite possibilities. One small choice can change the course of history and set the universe on any number of different paths. What if those choices, those moments, turned the situation...dark?

When SPIDER-MAN received a new costume during SECRET WARS, he was unaware it was a living symbiote that was bonded to him. After having tests run by REED RICHARDS, A.K.A. MR. FANTASTIC of the FANTASTIC FOUR, the symbiote was removed and kept in a cage.

BEN GRIMM, A.K.A. the Ever-Lovin', Blue-Eyed THING, was a founding member of the FANTASTIC FOUR, but after the events of SECRET WARS, he went out on his own, leaving the FF.

What if...when Ben Grimm returns to the Fantastic Four, he finds the symbiote still locked up, and these two moments in time begin to collide...?
PHILIP TAN, JAY LEISTEN & RACHELLE ROSENBERG COVER ARTISTS
NICK BRADSHAW & RACHELLE ROSENBERG (HOMAGE); SKAN VARIANT COVER ARTISTS

page_summary: Cover: A stylized, high-contrast graphic depiction of Venom's face dominates the page. The cover includes extensive text providing the premise of a 'What If...?' story involving Ben Grimm and the symbiote, alongside full creative credits.
